name: Grilled, Stuffed Pork Tenderloin
recipeIngredient: 2 whole pork tenderloins, cut in half and butterflied
2 yellow peppers, grilled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In the center of each pork tenderloin, spread a thin layer of tapanade.
2. Roll up the seasoned pork and secure with kitchen twine if needed.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet until it almost starts to smoke.
4. Sear the pork tenderloins on all sides until they are browned but not cooked through.
5. Grill the seared pork for 3 minutes on each side, or until fully cooked.
6. To prepare Charred Yellow Pepper Sauce:
- Combine all ingredients in a blender and puree until smooth.
- Season with salt and pepper to taste.
